channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 24th June
item.description:
Give and take plus 15. Minutes delay boards 28 day carriage way pothole 400x300x50mm (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 24th June
item.description:
15MDB CWED 1000 X 300 X 44MM MARKED AS NUMBER 6 (CW6 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 24th June
item.description:
15MDB CWED 10 METERS X 300 X 55MM MARKED AS NUMBER 5 (CW6 Edge Deterioration)

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 24th June
item.description:
15MDB CWED 3000 X 300 X 55MM MARKED AS NUMBER 4 (CW6 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cement has been dumped in the drain and the water level is just below the grill, 24th June
item.description:
The drain outside no 42 is partially blocked with cement. We are very worried if we have a downpour as we have flooded only a year ago and in 2007. We do not want to flood again because drains and rivers are being kept clear.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Sandford Mill Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicles turning right at the traffic lights from pioneer way onto Mobley’s drive into coopers edge are not stopping at the give way lines. Vehicles going straight on from gannet road are having near misses., 24th June
item.description:
See picture

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gambet Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.title: Dead branch liable to fall onto highway causing injury/damage to pedestrians/vehicles., 24th June
item.description:
Lime tree outside Beaconsfield Court, 57 Christchurch Road, Cheltenham, GL50 2PR

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, Christchurch Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 24th June
item.description:
Give and take 28 days aburt level difference please lift and relay x1 rocking 600x600x20mm slab (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 24th June
item.description:
Give and take 28 days aburt level difference please lift and relay x1 raised rocking 600x600x20mm slab (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 24th June
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 24th June
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 24th June
item.description:
Give and take 28 days aburt level difference please lift and replace broken sunken 900x600x20mm slab (FW Broken Slabs)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 24th June
item.description:
Give and take 28 days aburt level difference please lift and replace x1 chipped x1 concrete patch with new slab 600x600x20mm slab stats required (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 24th June
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure please cut back overgrown tree branches growing out into footway and carriage way approx 3 meters x 1 meters (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet
